shorts.title: Army Under Secretary Tours Scranton Army Ammunition Plant
shorts.title_distilled: Army Under Secretary Tours Scranton Army Ammunition Plant.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, Pa. — The Under Secretary of the Army, Honorable Michael Obadal, visited the Scranton Army Ammunition Plant on March 19. SCAAP is a government-owned, contractor-operated facility, and is one of 17 arsenals, depots, and ammunition plants that are sub…

shorts.title: Kids, teens, adults learning ASL together at community library
shorts.title_distilled: Kids, teens, adults learning ASL together at community library.
shorts.description: PECKVILLE, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A different kind of language lesson brought kids, teens, and adults together Monday night in Peckville. Valley Community Library held a beginner American Sign Language (ASL) class for people eight and older. The class had room for about 30 people, and close to that many came out to learn. Attendees [...]

shorts.title_distilled: Bresnahan weighs in after Correspondents' Dinner Shooting.
shorts.description: (WBRE/WYOU) — Lawmakers are also weighing in on the violence that broke out in Washington. Monday morning, 28/22 News spoke with Republican Congressman Rob Bresnahan who represents the Wilkes-Barre Scranton area and part of the Poconos. After getting threats before his wedding and seeing the attack on the Pennsylvania governor's residence, he says political violence [...]

shorts.title: West Linden Street Bridge Rehabilitation Project kicks off in Scranton
shorts.title_distilled: West Linden Street Bridge Rehabilitation Project kicks off in Scranton.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Heads up for drivers in the Electric City: There are some traffic changes because of a bridge project. Starting on Monday, the West Linden Street Bridge Rehabilitation Project is underway. Traffic entering the city will be detoured, using North 7th, West Lackawanna, and Franklin Avenues, before reconnecting to Linden Street. [...]
shorts.content: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Heads up for drivers in the Electric City: There are some traffic changes because of a bridge project. Starting on Monday, the West Linden Street Bridge Rehabilitation Project is underway. Traffic entering the city will be detoured, using North 7th, West Lackawanna, and Franklin Avenues, before reconnecting to Linden Street. [...]
